views.name: Session Detail Page

layout.description: Two-column resizable layout: conversation tree (35%) left, summary + debug tabs (65%) right

columns.name: Conversation Tree
columns.content: Hierarchical tree of user inputs, agent nodes, LLM calls, tool calls, responses

sections.name: Summary
sections.content: Metrics (cost, tokens, latency, LLM calls) + node detail tabs

dataFlow: observatory-store.addEvent() creates spans, events, flowNodes, metrics
working: Two-column resizable layout with horizontal drag handle
Vertical resizable split (summary top / debug tabs bottom)
Breadcrumb navigation with shortened session ID
Top-right metrics bar (trace count, token count, cost)
Session store hydration from REST data
Observatory store replay from trace events
broken: Conversation tree shows [object Object] when message.content is ContentBlock[] instead of string
Cost shows '--' for sessions where DB estimatedCost is 0 and no trace-level cost aggregation is wired to UI
recentlyFixed: ClickHouse traces now store real span_id/parent_span_id/agent_name (2026-03-10)
Dedicated /metrics endpoint available for server-side cost/token aggregation (2026-03-10)

views.name: Agent Conversation Tree
working: Hierarchical tree with expand/collapse (auto-expanded to depth 2)
Click-to-select highlights node and updates selectedTraceNodeId in UI store
Token/latency badges on LLM and tool call nodes
Hex ID filtering (avoids showing raw MongoDB ObjectIds as labels)
broken: When message.content is ContentBlock[] (rich content), label shows 'User input' instead of extracted text

views.name: Session Summary Panel
views.dataSource: metrics from useSessionDetail, traceEvents, tree, selected node from ui-store

sections.name: Node Detail
sections.content: Selected node detail based on active tab

working: Metric cards with cost, tokens, latency, LLM calls
Tab switching with selected node detail
Voice tab auto-detected from voice_session_start events
broken: No fullscreen mode for large JSON payloads
recentlyFixed: Metrics can now be fetched from dedicated /metrics endpoint with ClickHouse fallback (2026-03-10)

views.name: Debug Tabs
broken: Performance tab (LLMCallsTab) needs to wire useSessionTraces with types=llm_call filter for ClickHouse fallback
recentlyFixed: Backend ClickHouse traces store real span_id/parent_span_id (2026-03-10)
UI replay prefers real spanId/parentSpanId from eventData — historical spans now form correct hierarchies (2026-03-10)
DebugTabs shows contextual 'traces_not_stored' message when spans empty but metrics exist (2026-03-10)

views.name: Waterfall Panel + Span Tree

sections.name: Summary Bar
sections.content: Spans count, Duration, Tokens, Cost, Errors, Live/Historical indicator

sections.name: Span Tree
sections.content: Expandable parent-child hierarchy with cost column

features: Expandable span tree with parent-child hierarchy
Cost column with color coding (green < $0.01, yellow < $0.10, red >= $0.10)
Decision event rendering inline with reason text
working: Full span tree rendering for live sessions
recentlyFixed: UI replay uses real spanId/parentSpanId from eventData — historical waterfall renders correct hierarchy (2026-03-10)

views.name: Node Detail Panel
working: Full detail rendering for LLM calls (cost, tokens, latency)
broken: No tool call input/output formatting (raw JSON only)
No diff view for comparing request/response across LLM calls

views.name: Floating Debug Panel
views.purpose: Draggable, resizable floating panel containing DebugTabs (used during live chat)

views.name: Session List / Sessions Explorer
features: Show: agent name, status, message count, duration, token count, cost
broken: No channel filter in UI (API supports it)
No status filter in UI (API supports it)
